changeSet.author: teller-statt-tonne
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO feature (feature_key, label, description, category, sort_order, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('nav.dashboard', 'Menü: Übersicht', 'Top-Level-Menüpunkt „Übersicht“.', 'Navigation', 10, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

INSERT INTO feature (feature_key, label, description, category, sort_order, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('nav.events', 'Menü: Termine', 'Top-Level-Menüpunkt „Termine“.', 'Navigation', 20, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

INSERT INTO feature (feature_key, label, description, category, sort_order, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('nav.partners', 'Menü: Betriebe', 'Top-Level-Menüpunkt „Betriebe“.', 'Navigation', 30, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

INSERT INTO feature (feature_key, label, description, category, sort_order, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('nav.map', 'Menü: Karte', 'Top-Level-Menüpunkt „Karte“.', 'Navigation', 40, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

INSERT INTO feature (feature_key, label, description, category, sort_order, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('nav.planner', 'Menü: Planung', 'Top-Level-Menüpunkt „Planung“.', 'Navigation', 50, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

INSERT INTO feature (feature_key, label, description, category, sort_order, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('nav.distribution-points', 'Menü: Verteilerplätze', 'Top-Level-Menüpunkt „Verteilerplätze“.', 'Navigation', 60, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

INSERT INTO feature (feature_key, label, description, category, sort_order, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('nav.store-members', 'Menü: Retter im Betrieb', 'Menüpunkt „Retter im Betrieb“.', 'Navigation', 70, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

INSERT INTO feature (feature_key, label, description, category, sort_order, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('nav.quiz', 'Menü: Quiz', 'Top-Level-Menüpunkt „Quiz“.', 'Navigation', 80, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

INSERT INTO feature (feature_key, label, description, category, sort_order, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('nav.quiz-admin', 'Menü: Quiz-Admin', 'Menüpunkt zur Quiz-Verwaltung.', 'Navigation', 90, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

INSERT INTO feature (feature_key, label, description, category, sort_order, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('nav.admin', 'Menü: Admin', 'Top-Level-Menüpunkt zum Admin-Bereich.', 'Navigation', 100, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

INSERT INTO feature (feature_key, label, description, category, sort_order, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('nav.admin.permissions', 'Menü: Berechtigungen (Admin)', 'Card im Admin-Dashboard für Berechtigungs-Verwaltung.', 'Navigation', 110, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

INSERT INTO feature (feature_key, label, description, category, sort_order, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('route.planner', 'Route: Planung bearbeiten', 'Zugriff auf Planungs-Routen mit Schreibrechten.', 'Routen', 200, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

INSERT INTO feature (feature_key, label, description, category, sort_order, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('route.planner.view', 'Route: Planung ansehen', 'Lesender Zugriff auf Planungs-Routen.', 'Routen', 210, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

INSERT INTO feature (feature_key, label, description, category, sort_order, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('route.user.edit', 'Route: Benutzer bearbeiten', 'Zugriff auf Benutzer-Bearbeitungs-Routen.', 'Routen', 220, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

INSERT INTO feature (feature_key, label, description, category, sort_order, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('route.quiz.admin', 'Route: Quiz-Verwaltung', 'Zugriff auf Quiz-Admin-Routen.', 'Routen', 230, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

INSERT INTO feature (feature_key, label, description, category, sort_order, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('route.admin', 'Route: Admin-Bereich', 'Zugriff auf alle Admin-Routen (/admin/**).', 'Routen', 240, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

INSERT INTO feature (feature_key, label, description, category, sort_order, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('route.admin.permissions', 'Route: Berechtigungen verwalten', 'Zugriff auf die Berechtigungs-Verwaltungs-Seite.', 'Routen', 250, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

INSERT INTO feature (feature_key, label, description, category, sort_order, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('quiz.attempt.delete', 'Aktion: Quiz-Versuch löschen', 'Quiz-Versuch eines Benutzers löschen.', 'Aktionen', 300, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

changeSet.author: teller-statt-tonne
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO role_feature (role_id, feature_id) SELECT r.id, f.id FROM role r CROSS JOIN feature f WHERE r.name = 'ADMINISTRATOR'

INSERT INTO role_feature (role_id, feature_id) SELECT r.id, f.id FROM role r JOIN feature f ON f.feature_key IN ( 'nav.dashboard','nav.events','nav.partners','nav.map','nav.quiz', 'nav.planner','nav.distribution-points','nav.store-members','nav.quiz-admin', 'route.planner','route.planner.view','route.user.edit','route.quiz.admin' ) WHERE r.name = 'TEAMLEITER'

INSERT INTO role_feature (role_id, feature_id) SELECT r.id, f.id FROM role r JOIN feature f ON f.feature_key IN ( 'nav.dashboard','nav.events','nav.partners','nav.map','nav.quiz', 'nav.planner','route.planner','route.planner.view' ) WHERE r.name = 'RETTER'

INSERT INTO role_feature (role_id, feature_id) SELECT r.id, f.id FROM role r JOIN feature f ON f.feature_key IN ( 'nav.dashboard','nav.events','nav.partners','nav.map','nav.quiz' ) WHERE r.name = 'NEW_MEMBER'
